steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes a shift: Wigner’s 1934 conjecture about a crystal "remained largely conjecture" until 2021, when researchers captured the first image. The key signal is the claim that Wang’s team achieved the first visual confirmation. This defines the core new development the text is emphasizing.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the main claim
steps.content: Choice A directly states the confirmed evidence for the Wigner crystal, mirroring the phrase "first visual confirmation." B focuses on the method (inserting graphene) rather than confirmation, C narrows the focus to a component (graphene), and D misrepresents the difficulty as inherent to the structure, not the scientific gap. That matches choice A — A is correct.
